rows.description: July 23 Advanced to Mr Inman on acc't of the purchase
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's value. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this row with the subsequent sub-entry and extracted an incorrect amount (305 pounds instead of 5, and 8 pence instead of 0). Visual verification confirms the amount is £5, 16s, 0d.

rows.notes: Added this row, which was correctly identified as a distinct sub-entry by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini missed this row by incorrectly merging it with the preceding entry. Visual verification confirms it's an indented sub-entry connected by a brace, with no direct monetary amount.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Tenement holdings at Bushey (no amount recorded).

rows.description: Letters & Parcels - for the year to Nov 2. 1825 -
rows.notes: Monetary values agreed by both extractors and visually confirmed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it more accurately reflects 'Nov 2.' and the trailing dash; gpt-5-mini incorrectly read 'Novr. 2'.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Postage and parcels expenses for the year to 2 November 1825, amounting to £2 12s 10d.

rows.notes: Monetary values agreed by both extractors and visually confirmed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it is more accurate; gpt-5-mini misread 'Tomus' as 'Forms' and 'Battels' as 'Bottles'.
